prompt: Create a bold, high-impact commercial poster for a bag of potato chips in a bright warm orange-to-golden-yellow gradient background, with a dynamic snack-advertising layout and crisp studio lighting. The composition features one large open bag of chips in the lower right corner, tilted upward, overflowing with ridged golden potato chips, while exactly 9 clearly visible chips float around the upper and middle right area in midair with many small crumbs and seasoning flecks suspended for energy and motion. Use oversized distressed display typography stacked vertically on the left side reading exactly: “CRISPY.” on the top in dark reddish brown, “CRUNCHY.” in very large white letters, and “IRRESISTIBLE.” in saturated red-orange. Beneath that, place a dark brown brushstroke banner with handwritten cream script reading “Snack Happy!”. In the lower left corner, add one circular badge in red-orange with rough edges containing the text “MADE WITH REAL POTATOES” and smaller text “NO ARTIFICIAL FLAVORS”, plus 2 small potatoes illustrated at the bottom of the badge. Along the bottom edge, include exactly 3 simple white icon-and-text feature callouts separated evenly: “REAL POTATOES”, “NO ARTIFICIAL FLAVORS”, and “MADE FOR SNACK LOVERS”. The chip bag should be glossy metallic yellow with a large black irregular label shape on the front; inside it place the product name in big distressed white letters “ZESTY” and below it a red banner with white text “POTATO CHIPS”, then smaller black text near the bottom right reading “BOLD FLAVOR. PERFECT CRUNCH.”. Add a small rounded brand label in the upper left corner with the text “Pollo AI” and “GPT Image 2” beneath it. Emphasize appetizing texture, crunchy edges, realistic salt and seasoning specks, strong contrast, subtle grunge texture on the typography, and a polished modern supermarket-poster aesthetic ready for print or social promotion.
